info.name: TenT — Timesheet APIs
info.description:
All timesheet-related API endpoints for the TenT backend (`apps/backend/app/timesheet/`).

Auth: the backend proxy injects `x-user-id` from the JWT session — set the `x-user-id` header directly when calling the backend on port 3000 without the proxy.

variable.description: User ID injected by the proxy (set manually when hitting the backend directly)

header.description: Injected by proxy; set manually when bypassing the proxy

request.description:
Returns all timesheets for the authenticated user, ordered by sequenceNumber descending.

**Response 200**
```json
{
  "timesheets": [ { ...Timesheet } ],
  "total": 3
}
```

Creates a new timesheet for the authenticated user.

**Body fields**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| title | string | ✅ | min 1 char |
| periodStart | string | ✅ | YYYY-MM-DD |
| periodEnd | string | ✅ | YYYY-MM-DD; must be ≥ periodStart |
| notes | string | ❌ | |
| status | TimesheetStatus | ❌ | INCOMPLETE \| COMPLETED \| MISSING |

**Response 201**
```json
{ "timesheet": { ...Timesheet } }
```

Returns a single timesheet with its entries ordered by workDate asc.

**Response 200**
```json
{ "timesheet": { ...Timesheet, entries: [...] } }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found

Partially updates a timesheet. At least one field must be provided.

**Body fields** (all optional, but at least one required)
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| title | string | min 1 char |
| notes | string \| null | |
| periodStart | string | YYYY-MM-DD |
| periodEnd | string | YYYY-MM-DD; must be ≥ periodStart |
| status | TimesheetStatus | INCOMPLETE \| COMPLETED \| MISSING |
| submittedAt | string \| null | ISO datetime or null to clear |

**Response 200**
```json
{ "timesheet": { ...Timesheet } }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found

Permanently deletes a timesheet owned by the authenticated user.

**Response 200**
```json
{ "message": "Timesheet deleted" }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found

query.description: Optional. Must be a Monday (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to Monday 7 weeks ago.
Optional. Must be a Sunday (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to current Sunday.

request.description:
Returns a list of ISO weeks between `weekStart` and `weekEnd` with aggregated stats. Both params are optional — defaults to the past 8 weeks (inclusive of current week).

Also auto-creates missing Timesheet placeholder rows for every week in the range.

**Query params**
| Param | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| weekStart | string | ❌ | YYYY-MM-DD; **must be a Monday** |
| weekEnd | string | ❌ | YYYY-MM-DD; **must be a Sunday** |

**Response 200**
```json
{
  "weeks": [
    {
      "weekStart": "2026-05-19",
      "weekEnd": "2026-05-25",
      "status": "INCOMPLETE",
      "taskCount": 5,
      "completedTaskCount": 3,
      "pendingTaskCount": 2,
      "totalLoggedHours": 32.5,
      "totalRegularHours": 30,
      "totalOvertimeHours": 2.5,
      "timesheetId": "clxxxxxxxxxx"
    }
  ]
}
```

Returns a full day-by-day breakdown (Mon → Sun) for the given ISO week.

**Path param**
| Param | Notes |
|---|---|
| weekStart | YYYY-MM-DD; **must be a Monday** |

**Response 200**
```json
{
  "weekStart": "2026-05-26",
  "weekEnd": "2026-06-01",
  "status": "INCOMPLETE",
  "taskCount": 4,
  "completedTaskCount": 2,
  "pendingTaskCount": 2,
  "totalHours": 20,
  "regularHours": 18,
  "overtimeHours": 2,
  "timesheetId": "clxxxxxxxxxx",
  "days": [
    {
      "date": "2026-05-26",
      "dayOfWeek": "Monday",
      "totalHours": 8,
      "entries": [
        {
          "entryId": "clxxxxxxxxxx",
          "timesheetId": "clxxxxxxxxxx",
          "hours": 8,
          "isOvertime": false,
          "startTime": "2026-05-26T09:00:00.000Z",
          "endTime": "2026-05-26T17:00:00.000Z",
          "description": "Worked on feature X",
          "createdAt": "2026-05-26T17:05:00.000Z",
          "updatedAt": "2026-05-26T17:05:00.000Z",
          "task": { "id": "...", "title": "...", "type": "...", "status": "...", "priority": "...", "estimatedHours": 8, "loggedHours": 8, "startDate": "2026-05-26", "dueDate": "2026-05-26", "completedAt": null },
          "project": { "id": "...", "name": "...", "color": "...", "status": "..." },
          "createdBy": { "id": "...", "firstName": "...", "lastName": "...", "profilePic": null },
          "assignedBy": null
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

Returns all entries for the given timesheet, ordered by workDate then createdAt.

**Response 200**
```json
{
  "entries": [ { ...TimesheetEntry } ],
  "total": 5
}
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found

Creates a new timesheet entry. Also recomputes totalHours / regularHours / overtimeHours rollups on the parent Timesheet.

**Body fields**
| Field | Type | Required | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| taskId | string | ✅ | |
| workDate | string | ✅ | YYYY-MM-DD |
| hours | number | ✅ | positive, max 99.99 |
| startTime | string | ❌ | ISO datetime |
| endTime | string | ❌ | ISO datetime |
| isOvertime | boolean | ❌ | defaults to false |
| description | string | ❌ | |

**Response 201**
```json
{ "entry": { ...TimesheetEntry } }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found

Partially updates a timesheet entry. At least one field must be provided. Also recomputes rollups on the parent Timesheet.

**Body fields** (all optional, but at least one required)
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| taskId | string | |
| workDate | string | YYYY-MM-DD |
| hours | number | positive, max 99.99 |
| startTime | string \| null | ISO datetime or null to clear |
| endTime | string \| null | ISO datetime or null to clear |
| isOvertime | boolean | |
| description | string \| null | |

**Response 200**
```json
{ "entry": { ...TimesheetEntry } }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found / Entry not found

Deletes a timesheet entry and recomputes rollups on the parent Timesheet.

**Response 200**
```json
{ "message": "Entry deleted" }
```
**Response 404** — Timesheet not found / Entry not found
